function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request as written. I found a canonical project record for Window Farm Notes, but I did not find any canonical record (or start date) for a separate “sailboat refit notebook” item—only descriptive mentions in a parking-lot note. Please clarify which exact file represents the sailboat refit notebook (or provide its path/start date), and I can then compare dates and delete the correct file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed inbox workflow (lowest filename), read required system workflows before task work, and followed deletion guidance: do not delete when evidence does not uniquely support a target. Per inbox rules, left inbox file untouched when blocked on clarification.
function.outcome_justification: Window Farm Notes has a canonical project record at 40_projects/2026_05_05_window_farm_notes/README.MD (folder date implies project creation date). For “sailboat refit notebook,” only mentions are in 30_knowledge/notes/parking-lot.md and they are narrative/fantasy text without a canonical record or start date. Without two verifiable start dates, I cannot determine which started earlier, so deletion would require guessing.
